name: Rui Kamishiro / Pjsekai
description:
Rui Kamishiro - Project Sekai

He didn't want to leave his best friend.

Not a fan of this intro because it isn't as detailed as I wanted. But I love Rui and wanted to make a bot for him.

I'll be working on the few requests I got soon, since I finally found out how to read them lol.

No art credit, this is an official card.
